positive: A stylized, symmetrical celestial geometric tapestry featuring interconnected moons, constellations, and ethereal nebula swirls. The central element is a magnificent, minimalist winged creature silhouette (like a phoenix or stylized griffin) rendered in stark negative space against deep indigo and sapphire gradients. Use metallic gold linework for all geometric components and delicate brushstroke textures for the nebula. The composition must be highly detailed, centered, and suitable for a repeating pattern or a large central chest print. Style should be Neo-Art Deco combined with sacred geometry and mandalas. Extreme contrast, high detail, clean silhouette, centered composition, digital illustration, 8k, vector-like quality.
negative: blur, grainy, artifact, watermark, text, low resolution, bad anatomy, noise, poorly drawn, extra limbs, messy, realism, photo, logos, corporate, muted colors
